titleStmt.title: SII 33.72: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 72. (A.R. No. 22 of 1947.) Suṅkēsula, Pulivendla Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab built into the platform called Chuḍammakaṭṭa.
This is dated Śaka • • • • • śukla, Jyēshṭha.
Records a gift of land to Nāgōja Timmayya for having constructed a well at Suṅkēsula by Mahānāyakāchārya Ruju Bāpayya-Basavayya-Kētivayya-Nāgayya, who held the village as fief from Sāḷuva Gōvindayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī jayā
śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
Agunēṭi śukla saṁvatsara jēṣṭa
lu śrī manmāhānāyaṁkka
cā¨rryulaina rujubāpayya basavayyakēti
vayya nāgayyagāru nāgōju tiṁmayya
gāriki yiccina nūtimānyakramame
ṭlaṁnnanu sāḷuva gōviṁdayyagāru māku
nāyaṁkurānaku pāliṁccina siṁkēśula
nu cērunūyinaḍava davvi rāyigaṭṭiṁci naṁ
duku mīku mānyaṁgānu peṭṭina cenu vūri
ki paḍumara nāgulakaḍi rēgaḍicēnu kha 1
Akṣarāna puṭṭeḍu yiddumu cēnu yīcēnu
mī putra pautrapāraṁpariyumugā
nu Ācaṁdrā¨rka stāhigānu Anubha
viṁcēdi yī mānyanaku yevvaru tapinā
nu kāśilō gōbrāṁhmāṇavadhaśesina pā
pana pōvuvāru sunaka māṁsamu suraśē
viṁccinavāru vāni Āliki paṁcāḷaṁ vāri
panasa koḍukē maguṁḍu maṁgaḷamahā
śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 33.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
